serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: URL of the running Singularity Memory server (HTTP+MCP).

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.help: Scope identifier for this OpenClaw instance's memory.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional bearer token for an authenticated Singularity Memory server.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories into the prompt before each agent run.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Persist user messages as memories at the end of each agent run.

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.help: Max number of memories injected per recall.
